item.name: Traveling Supporter Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of some unknown material. Placing it near your traveling supporter will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Traveling Supporter
mount.action: Summon forth your traveling supporter. Proof that there is nothing a pair of bunny ears can't improve.
mount.description: This advanced bipedal machina was found wandering the Carteneau Flats by a quartermaster of the Eorzean Alliance. While it bears a striking resemblance to Allagan clockwork soldiers, it appears to have been enhanced by unknown hands (or paws).
mount.tooltip:
The supporter? I never would have
suspected... It's supposed to help us
farm carrots, not eat them!
- Watchingway
